headline: CFO experience from inside WPP, EMI Music, and Warner Music — not from a textbook
ghostStatement: Wilgert Hart spent nearly three decades as a senior finance leader inside businesses that were always scaling, restructuring, or being integrated — CFO Netherlands and CFO Europe & Netherlands at Hill & Knowlton (WPP), with earlier roles at EMI Music Netherlands and Warner Music Benelux. That is the experience he brings to a scale-up's finance function: not a framework from a consulting firm, but an operator's instinct from having done the work.

headline: A senior CFO with a network of finance professionals ready for execution depth
ghostStatement: Start to Scale brings Wilgert's senior finance experience plus a network of finance professionals on call when the engagement demands more execution depth. A scale-up does not always need a full finance team — but when it does, Start to Scale can mobilize one.

headline: Start to Scale builds and runs the finance function — then hands it over
ghostStatement: Most fractional CFOs advise. Start to Scale installs: chart of accounts, monthly close, cash forecast, KPI dashboard, board cadence. Wilgert runs the finance function until it is bedded in and a permanent hire can take over. The deliverable is not a presentation — it is a finance operating system that works.

headline: Silent partners providing strategic counsel, network access, and operational infrastructure
ghostStatement: Start to Scale is backed by Duke Strategies — the strategic advisory firm founded by Ingo Heijnen and Arien Stuijt, former Hill+Knowlton Strategies leaders. As silent partners, Duke provides strategic counsel, access to a wider professional network, and the brand and operational infrastructure that lets Start to Scale focus entirely on the client's finance function.
